page: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. The instance is allocated 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This instance type does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage. It is, however, designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance remote disks. The instance contains zero GPUs and does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC8es_v6 offers a dedicated CPU allocation and a balanced memory-to-core ratio within its hardware class, making it suitable for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without the overhead of local storage. This server type is designed for general-purpose workloads, database management, and memory-optimized applications that rely on network-attached premium storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine instance within the DCEV6 server family, operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a resource ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not bundle any local storage or integrated graphics processing units, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, enabling high-performance external block storage attachments. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance without resource contention. This hardware profile makes the DC8es_v6 well-suited for database hosting, general-purpose enterprise applications, and memory-optimized workloads that rely entirely on network-attached storage solutions.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC8es_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine in the DCEV6 family featuring 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability with no local storage or GPUs.

tagline: A dedicated Intel-powered virtual machine featuring eight vCPUs, thirty-two gigabytes of memory, and premium remote storage capabilities.

32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included

Best suited for database hosting and general-purpose workloads
